description_long: This information point is a tall, freestanding, triangular column with three vertical display panels, each featuring vibrant, high-resolution graphics. The panels are adorned with a striking image of a woman's face surrounded by autumn leaves, and bold white text reading 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS.' The structure stands on a square wooden platform, which provides stability and a visually appealing base. The panels appear to be made of a rigid, smooth material, likely aluminum or composite, with a printed vinyl or acrylic overlay for the graphics. The top of the column is open, revealing a hollow interior, and the edges are sharply defined, giving the object a modern, clean-lined appearance. The overall design is eye-catching and intended to attract attention in public or commercial spaces.
description: A tall, triangular information column with vivid graphics and bold text, standing on a wooden platform. Its modern, clean design features striking imagery and serves as a prominent visual marker.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main display panel with the woman's face and 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' text, alongside a human figure for scale.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the edge of the triangular column and the continuation of the graphic design, with the human figure partially obscured.
description_view_2: The rear angled view reveals more of the side panel artwork and the open top of the column, with the human figure facing away.
description_view_3: The back view focuses on the two angled panels meeting at a corner, emphasizing the triangular shape and uninterrupted graphics.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features high-contrast, full-color printed graphics with a photorealistic portrait and autumnal motifs, bordered by crisp, clean edges. The surface is uninterrupted by frames or reliefs, emphasizing a sleek, modern aesthetic.
